description: Repository maintenance agent for agentic-core-system. Follows the canonical AGENTS.md and .agents context with git-permission parity from .agents/permissions.json.
name: agentic-core-system-maintainer
prompt: Follow AGENTS.md and the relevant .agents/skills/**/SKILL.md as the canonical repository agent context. Steering files under .kiro/steering delegate back to AGENTS.md and .agents. Do not weaken repository safety rules.
